## Summary

Briefly describe the bug that was fixed and the expected behavior after the fix.

---

## Root Cause

- What caused the bug?
- Which component or code path was affected?

---

## Change Details

- What was changed to fix the bug?
- Which alternatives were considered?

---

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Regression test added or existing test updated to cover this case
- [ ] Frontend lint and typecheck pass where applicable

---

## Validation

- [ ] Fix verified locally against the running stack (`make up`)
- [ ] Secrets are not exposed in logs, screenshots, or code

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] The contribution guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) were considered and applied.

---

## Additional Notes

Add any reviewer context, related issues, or follow-up work.
